top_signals.title: Discord migrates all users to end-to-end encryption by default
top_signals.summary: The move comes as other major social media platforms are killing end-to-end encryption for messaging. In recent months, Instagram and TikTok both announced they will no longer offer the feature.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Potential liquidity or banking-system instability affecting financial conditions.

top_signals.title: Freeport says Grasberg on track for full production by end of 2027
top_signals.summary: Grasberg is now running at 50% of capacity and is expected to reach 65% later this year, Freeport Indonesia's CEO says.
